command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup
git pull origin main

echo "=== EXPORT POST-CHANGE WORKFLOW ==="
curl -s -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0YjkyYzA5MS1kMTM3LTRiYmYtODIyMy03ODFhMjZjZGQwODEiLCJpc3MiOiJuOG4iLCJhdWQiOiJwdWJsaWMtYXBpIiwianRpIjoiMDAxZTM0OWYtNjYzMC00OTQyLTljOTQtZGEyZjk4YzlmOGYzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgwNzk5OTExfQ.SRoqA9YJaMud-bhWB1KqGOzat9f8hXDlqe9aHxIMerE" "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows/pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P" -o /tmp/router-8j.json
echo "Export: $(wc -c < /tmp/router-8j.json) bytes"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/router-8j.json')); print('Nodes:', [n['name'] for n in d.get('nodes',[])])"
cp /tmp/router-8j.json "baselines/production/router/chatgpt-homelab-agent-router-Phase8J-PromotionBlocking.json"

echo "=== COMMIT ==="
git add baselines/
git commit -m "Phase 8J Sentinel Promotion Blocking Authority"

echo "=== TAG ==="
git tag Phase8J-SentinelPromotionBlocking

echo "=== PUSH ==="
git push origin main && git push origin Phase8J-SentinelPromotionBlocking
git push github main && git push github Phase8J-SentinelPromotionBlocking

echo "=== LOG ==="
git log --oneline -5
git tag -l | tail -5
